dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8071 IH: Strengthening and Improving Mobilization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Green of Texas introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Defense Production Act of 1950 to require the Defense Production Act Committee to conduct discussion-based simulations, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Strengthening and Improving Mobilization Act of 2026.
Title III of the Defense Production Act of 1950 (50 U.S.C. 4531 et seq.) is amended by adding at the end the following:

At least once every 5 years, the Defense Production Act Committee shall conduct a discussion-based simulation (commonly known as a table-top exercise) to determine the resources needed and the best use of the authorities under title I and this title.

The first undesignated section of the the Defense Production Act of 1950 is amended, effective on the date of enactment of such Act, by striking cited as “the Defense and inserting cited as the “Defense.
